{{Quote|It was where one of the last sieges of the Clone Wars took place.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Acherin''' was a conflict in the final days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
Fearing the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] rule was becoming more and more absolute, the planet [[Acherin]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] cause early on.

==The battle==
The battle raged until the very end of the war, when the Acherin Separatist commanders began ceasefire-negotiations with the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Garen Muln]].

Progress was going well, until Supreme Chancellor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], marking Muln as a traitor to the Republic. When the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] came for him, commanders [[Raina Quill]] and [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]] helped Garen Muln flee Acherin in secret.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|We wanted the right to secede from the Republic, not to turn the galaxy into a place of absolute power. Now we've got an Emperor breathing down our necks. Anyway, we were negotiating a truce with the Republic army when the Clone Wars ended. After we got a look at the Empire, we decided to call off the truce and keep fighting instead.|[[Raina Quill]]|<ref name="The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning" />}}
Realizing the threat of the new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the people of Acherin began a resistance movement, and would fight in yet another [[Battle of Acherin (Imperial Period)|battle]], that lasted almost a year.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' {{1stm}}
